commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ba0f131be4e92198fe063c1a00178857a7b2498f)
commands.review_summary:
The PR keeps agent-facing gateway config self-edits inside the narrow allowlist and adds a local config.get preflight that refuses agent-triggered restarts when the config snapshot is invalid or unreadable.

PR surface: Source +34, Tests +105. Total +139 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main schedules the gateway restart after the commands.restart gate without config.get, while the PR refuses before scheduling when config.get fails or returns valid:false.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is maintainer product/compatibility judgment about fail-closed restart recovery, not a safe autonomous repair.

target.title: fix(agents): harden gateway config self-edits
target.body:
Summary:
- Keep agent-facing gateway config self-edits within the existing narrow trust boundary; global media/model routing remains operator-owned.
- Validate the local gateway config snapshot before scheduling a restart, refusing restart when the snapshot cannot be loaded or is invalid.
- Add regression coverage for restart preflight failures, caller gateway override isolation, and protected media model routing fields.

Tests:
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents-core.config.ts src/agents/openclaw-gateway-tool.test.ts
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit-fast.config.ts src/agents/tools/gateway-tool-guard-coverage.test.ts
- node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/agents/tools/gateway-tool.ts

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: Agent-triggered gateway restart now refuses to continue when the local config snapshot is invalid or unreadable, instead of scheduling a restart against a broken local config.
- Real environment tested: Windows 11 host, Node 24, patched OpenClaw checkout at ba0f131b, temporary isolated OpenClaw gateway on loopback port 19078, temporary OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH. Tokens, local paths, and private endpoints are redacted.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: Started a temporary isolated gateway from the patched checkout, wrote an invalid local config with gateway.port set to a string, then invoked the agent gateway restart path through the patched gateway tool.
- Evidence after fix: Copied terminal output from the patched checkout:

```text
# commit
ba0f131b
# proof target
temporary isolated gateway on 127.0.0.1:19078
# temporary config mutation
OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=[REDACTED]/openclaw.json
wrote invalid config: { gateway: { port: "not-a-number" } }
# attempted agent gateway restart
# result
RESTART_REFUSED
# error
Refusing to restart because the config snapshot cannot be loaded: Invalid config at [REDACTED]/openclaw.json:
- gateway.port: Invalid input: expected number, received string. Fix the config first with `openclaw config validate` or `openclaw doctor --fix`.
target.author: daozheyuanxi

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
